fields.description: The Central event type, e.g. vm.status_changed | site.created | snapshot.completed | server.status_changed.
fields.label: Event Type

fields.description: pending = emitted inside an open transaction. queued = transaction committed and the event is eligible for delivery/retry. rolled_back = audit-only; the source transaction rolled back and must never be POSTed. ok = POSTed. error = Central rejected/unreachable, see Last Error. skipped = enabled but not registered (no atlas_id), so unroutable.
fields.label: Status
fields.options:
pending
queued
ok
error
skipped
rolled_back

fields.description: How many times deliver() POSTed this row. 0 while pending/queued/rolled_back; increments on every delivery attempt.
fields.label: Attempts

fields.description: When the event occurred (stamped at emit, carried verbatim to Central as occurred_at).
fields.label: Occurred At

fields.description: The HTTP status Central returned on the last attempt. 0 / blank when the request never got a response (network error) or was never sent (pending / skipped).
fields.label: HTTP Status

fields.description: The source DocType this event reports on, e.g. Virtual Machine | Site | Virtual Machine Snapshot | Server.
fields.label: Reference DocType

fields.description: The source document name as a Data SNAPSHOT (NOT a Link): an event log row must survive deletion of the VM / Site it reports on — a vm.deleted row outlives its VM by definition.
fields.label: Reference Name

fields.description: The error text from the last failed attempt (CentralError). BLANK on ok / pending / skipped.
fields.label: Last Error

fields.description: The exact event payload POSTed (or to be POSTed) to Central, as JSON.
fields.label: Payload
